description: This Java class 'LoanApplicationDraftService' provides business logic for managing loan application drafts, including creation, retrieval, update, patching sections, decisioning, readiness checks, and submission workflows. It interacts with repositories, handles JSON data manipulation, and encapsulates draft state management in a Spring Boot environment.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftService
classes.description: Service class encapsulating business logic for managing draft loan applications, including CRUD operations, section patching, automated decisioning, readiness checks, and submission workflows.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new draft loan application for a user, initializing its JSON data and metadata fields.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft owned by the user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts for a user, ordered by most recent update.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Performs a full update (replace) of a draft's fields, with version conflict detection.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section within the draft by merging JSON objects for data and section status.

methods.name: runDecisioning
methods.description: Calculates and persists risk score and decision logic for a draft.

methods.name: readiness
methods.description: Checks if a draft is ready for submission based on required sections and documents.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a draft, optionally running risk decisioning, and locks it from further edits.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a draft, ensuring it is not already submitted.
